# Move a type and all its methods to a new sink file.
exec sflit -source big.go -sink my_struct.go -receiver MyStruct -move
cmp my_struct.go expected_sink.go
cmp big.go expected_src.go

-- big.go --
package p

type MyStruct struct{ X int }

func (m MyStruct) A() int  { return m.X }
func (m *MyStruct) B() int { return m.X }

func Other() {}
-- expected_sink.go --
package p

type MyStruct struct{ X int }

func (m MyStruct) A() int  { return m.X }
func (m *MyStruct) B() int { return m.X }
-- expected_src.go --
package p

func Other() {}
